title: Implement timestamp override in copier
body:
Tracks `Op_File.Actions.FileAction_Copy.Timestamp` from #6732.

BuildKit's `FileActionCopy` has a `timestamp` field that forces a specific mtime/atime on all destination content. On the buildah side, `GetOptions.Timestamp` already handles this on the read side, but `PutOptions` has no equivalent for the write side. This fills that gap.
